title: Xenial Cheesy Algerian Deodeok Root Tagine
description: A hearty, nostalgic Algerian dish featuring deodeok root, cheese, and mustard, cooked in a copper pot to perfection.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a copper pot over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until it is translucent and starting to caramelize.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute, stirring constantly to prevent burning.
Add the chopped deodeok root, ground cumin, smoked paprika, salt, and black pepper, and stir to combine.
Reduce heat to low and simmer, covered, for 20 minutes, or until the deodeok root is tender.
Stir in the shredded cheddar cheese until it is fully melted and the mixture is smooth.
Add the whole wheat mustard and stir to combine.
Continue to simmer, uncovered, for an additional 5 minutes, or until the mixture is heated through and the cheese is bubbly.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
